title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 12
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear a teacher talking to a student.
questions.audio_script: Teacher: How is your history project going? || Student: Quite well. I found the information online and wrote the introduction last night. || Teacher: Have you added a map? || Student: Not yet, but Sam is doing that part. I thought I had to make a poster too. || Teacher: No, not for this project. [1]What you still need is a short conclusion at the end[/1]. || Student: Great. I can do that after school. || Teacher: Remember to check the spelling before you send it to me tomorrow morning. || Teacher: That should make things easier. || Teacher: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a birthday present.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you bought Ella's birthday present yet? || Man: Not yet. I was going to get a book, but she borrowed three from the library yesterday. || Woman: What about a plant? Ella likes those. || Man: True, but I bought something similar last year. I saw a nice silver picture frame in town, and [1]I think she'll like the silver picture frame[/1]. || Woman: That sounds perfect. Do you want me to come with you? || Man: Yes, please. I always choose better presents with help. || Man: That should make things easier. || Man: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a visitor asking for directions inside a building.
questions.audio_script: Receptionist: Are you here for the photography class? || Visitor: Yes, but I don't know where to go. The email said it was in Room 3. || Receptionist: It was, but we had to move it because the projector stopped working. || Visitor: Is it in the library now? || Receptionist: No, that room is being cleaned. [1]The photography class is in the computer room today[/1]. || Visitor: Thanks. Do I need to sign in first? || Receptionist: Yes, just write your name here, then follow the corridor to the end. || Receptionist: That should make things easier.

questions.context: You hear two people preparing for an event.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are you ready for the charity run on Sunday? || Man: Nearly. I was going to bring a camera, but my phone can take pictures. || Woman: We might need extra water too. || Man: Emma is bringing that, so don't worry. The organiser asked me this morning, and [1]I need to bring the box of race numbers[/1]. || Woman: Good. Is there space in your bag? || Man: Yes, if I take out my big coat. The forecast says it will be warm. || Man: That should make things easier. || Man: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a coach talking to a player.
questions.audio_script: Coach: Are you joining the practice this evening? || Player: Yes, but I'm not sure what to bring. Last week we used basketballs. || Coach: That was only because the hall was busy. Today we are outside again. || Player: Should I bring a net then? || Coach: No, the club has enough of those. [1]Bring your running shoes because we are doing fitness training[/1]. || Player: OK. I'll pack them with my water bottle. || Coach: Good. And arrive ten minutes early so we can start on time. || Coach: That should make things easier.

questions.context: You hear two colleagues talking at work.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Why did the meeting start late this morning? || Man: I thought it was because the manager arrived late, but that wasn't the main problem. || Woman: Was the computer broken again? || Man: No, it was working after someone restarted it. The real reason was that [1]the projector screen was locked in another room[/1]. || Woman: That explains it. Did anyone miss the first part? || Man: A few people did, so the manager is sending notes to everyone this afternoon. || Man: That should make things easier. || Man: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a parent asking for help at home.
questions.audio_script: Mum: Could you help me before dinner? The house is a mess because your cousins are coming. || Son: Sure. Do you want me to wash the dishes? || Mum: I already did that this morning. || Son: Then I can cut the grass. || Mum: Your dad is doing that outside. [1]Please put the clean towels in the bathroom[/1], please. || Son: OK. I'll start now, but I need five minutes to finish this message first. || Mum: That's fine. Just do it before they arrive. || Mum: That should make things easier. || Mum: I did not want to decide at the last minute.
